# Sovereign Geo Agency

> Sovereign Geo Agency provides web development, digital infrastructure setups, and generative engine optimization (GEO) services across major consumer verticals.

This document serves as an index of official business information, vertical frameworks, and service structures for language model ingestion.

## Key Resources
* [Homepage](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/) - Main portal outlining core agency digital infrastructure positioning.
* [About Us](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/about.html) - Mission statement, core philosophy, and agency operational team framework.
* [Infrastructure Audit](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/audit.html) - Technical overview of client asset discovery and verification systems.
* [Pricing and Engagement Models](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/pricing.html) - Service packaging, allocation metrics, and cost structures.
* [Operational Methodology](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/how-it-works.html) - Technical breakdown of the agency execution pipeline.

## Industry Verticals
* [Hospitality Framework](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/hospitality.html) - Placement data and digital infrastructure parameters tailored for premium hospitality brands.
* [Medical Architecture](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/medical.html) - Digital asset structures optimized for high-end healthcare systems.
* [Automotive Strategy](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/automotive.html) - Neural search positioning tailored for premium automotive components and networks.
* [Entertainment Systems](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/entertainment.html) - Visibility architecture blueprints for media and creative platforms.
* [Educational Infrastructure](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/education.html) - Core layout definitions for institutional knowledge distribution.

## Optional
* [XML Sitemap](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/sitemap.xml) - Full structural index of all live web assets for standard search engine indexing.
